inputData.question: Show average content rating vs professor rating for each professor

response.bodyRaw:
{"status":"success","steps":{"input":{"question":"Show average content rating vs professor rating for each professor"},"sql":{"payload":{"question":"Show average content rating vs professor rating for each professor"},"startedAt":1771855935431,"status":"success","output":{"reasoning":"The user wants to see average content rating vs professor rating for each professor. I need to join professors with course_evaluations through the enrollment and course_sections tables. The course_evaluations table contains both content_rating and professor_rating columns. I'll group by professor and calculate the averages for each rating type.","sql":"
SELECT 
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.content_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_content_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS evaluation_count
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY p.last_name, p.first_name
","assumptions":["Ratings are numeric values that can be averaged","Only professors with evaluations are included in results","Each enrollment can have at most one evaluation"]},"endedAt":1771855958836},"run-raw-sql":{"payload":{"sql":"

FROM professors p
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id

INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id

rating vs professor rating for each professor"},"result":{"sql":"
SELECT 
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.content_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_content_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS evaluation_count
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY p.last_name, p.first_name

visualization.title: Average Content Rating vs Professor Rating by Professor

resultRaw.sql:
SELECT 
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.content_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_content_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS evaluation_count
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY p.last_name, p.first_name

visualization.title: Average Content Rating vs Professor Rating by Professor

result.sql:
SELECT 
  p.id AS professor_id,
  p.first_name,
  p.last_name,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.content_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_content_rating,
  ROUND(AVG(ce.professor_rating)::numeric, 2) AS avg_professor_rating,
  COUNT(ce.id) AS evaluation_count
FROM professors p
INNER JOIN course_sections cs ON p.id = cs.professor_id
INNER JOIN enrollments e ON cs.id = e.course_section_id
INNER JOIN course_evaluations ce ON e.id = ce.enrollment_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.first_name, p.last_name
ORDER BY p.last_name, p.first_name
